# Exposure planning worksheet

## Inputs

```text
baseline rate:
minimum effect:
number of variants:
current expected organic exposure:
controlled exposure available:
false positive tolerance:
false negative tolerance:
```

## Decision

```text
If expected exposure < minimum useful exposure:
    use Trial Reel, paid micro-seeding, owned, community, or partner distribution.

If exposure cannot be increased:
    treat test as qualitative/directional only.
```

## Exposure quality notes

Record:

```text
organic
paid
owned audience
community
partner/collab
Trial Reel
cross-post
```

Do not compare variants exposed to radically different audiences without noting the bias.
